# @attestto/cr-vc-sdk

> Costa Rica domain SDK for issuing and verifying W3C Verifiable Credentials across the driving and identity ecosystem. Built on top of `@attestto/vc-sdk`.

An open technical proposal by [Attestto Open](https://attestto.org). The credential types and schemas are open for review by the competent institutions (COSEVI, MICITT, DGEV). Not an official standard.

## Install

```bash
npm install @attestto/cr-vc-sdk
```

Node ≥ 18. ESM + CJS dual build.

## Relationship to `vc-sdk`

`cr-vc-sdk` re-exports `VCIssuer`, `VCVerifier`, and `generateKeyPair` from `@attestto/vc-sdk` with the CR driving schema plugin pre-registered. You get the same universal API but with CR credential types, JSON-LD context, and claim structures wired in automatically. If you need a credential type not in this SDK, use `vc-sdk` directly and register your own schema plugin.

## Supported credential types

| Type | Description | Typical issuer |
|---|---|---|
| `DrivingLicense` | Digital driving license (mDL, ISO 18013-5) | COSEVI / DGEV |
| `TheoreticalTestResult` | Theory exam result (online or in-person) | DGEV / certified provider |
| `PracticalTestResult` | Practical driving exam result | DGEV / certified provider |
| `MedicalFitnessCredential` | Medical fitness certificate | Authorized clinic |
| `VehicleRegistration` | Vehicle registration (plate) | Registro Nacional |
| `VehicleTechnicalReview` | Technical inspection (RTV) | RTV center |
| `CirculationRights` | Circulation rights (marchamo) | Hacienda / Municipality |
| `SOATCredential` | Mandatory insurance (SOAT) | INS |
| `DriverIdentity` | Driver identity credential | TSE / DGME / bank / COSEVI |
| `TrafficViolation` | Traffic fine | COSEVI |
| `AccidentReport` | Accident report | COSEVI / INS |

## Quick start

### Issue a driving license

```typescript
import { VCIssuer, generateKeyPair } from '@attestto/cr-vc-sdk'

const keys = generateKeyPair()
const issuer = new VCIssuer({
  did: 'did:web:cosevi.attestto.id',
  privateKey: keys.privateKey,
})

const license = await issuer.issue({
  type: 'DrivingLicense',
  subjectDid: 'did:web:maria.attestto.id',
  expirationDate: '2032-04-01T23:59:59Z',
  claims: {
    licenseNumber: 'CR-2026-045678',  // cedula number in production
    categories: ['B', 'A1'],
    issueDate: '2026-04-01',
    status: 'active',
    points: 12,
    bloodType: 'O+',
    restrictions: ['lentes correctivos'],
    issuingAuthority: 'did:web:cosevi.attestto.id',
  },
})
```

### Issue a theory test result

```typescript
const testResult = await issuer.issue({
  type: 'TheoreticalTestResult',
  subjectDid: 'did:web:maria.attestto.id',
  claims: {
    status: 'approved',
    score: 88,
    passingScore: 70,
    category: 'B',
    testDate: '2026-03-15T14:00:00Z',
    modality: 'online',
    testCenterDID: 'did:web:academia-tica.attestto.id',
    proctoring: {
      method: 'remote-biometric',
      livenessVerified: true,
      identityVerified: true,
    },
  },
})
```

### Verify a credential

```typescript
import { VCVerifier } from '@attestto/cr-vc-sdk'

// Verify against a known public key
const verifier = new VCVerifier()
const result = await verifier.verifyWithKey(license, keys.publicKey, 'Ed25519', {
  checkExpiration: true,
  expectedType: 'DrivingLicense',
  expectedIssuer: 'did:web:cosevi.attestto.id',
})
console.log(result.valid)   // true
console.log(result.errors)  // []

// Verify via DID resolver (production path)
const resolverVerifier = new VCVerifier({
  resolvePublicKey: async (did, keyId) => {
    const res = await fetch(`https://${did.replace('did:web:', '')}/.well-known/did.json`)
    const doc = await res.json()
    // extract publicKey from doc.verificationMethod
    return { publicKey, algorithm: 'Ed25519' }
  },
})
const result = await resolverVerifier.verify(credential, { expectedType: 'DrivingLicense' })
```

### Issue as JWT (alternative format)

```typescript
const jwt = await issuer.issueJwt({ type: 'DrivingLicense', subjectDid, claims })
```

## API summary

```typescript
// Key generation
const keys = generateKeyPair('Ed25519' | 'ES256')
// keys.publicKey: Uint8Array
// keys.privateKey: Uint8Array
// keys.algorithm: string

// Issuer
const issuer = new VCIssuer({ did, privateKey, algorithm?, keyId? })
const vc  = await issuer.issue(options)      // Linked Data Proof
const jwt = await issuer.issueJwt(options)   // JWT format

// Verifier
const verifier = new VCVerifier({ resolvePublicKey? })
const result = await verifier.verify(vc, options?)
const result = await verifier.verifyWithKey(vc, publicKey, algorithm, options?)
```

## Source layout

```
src/
  index.ts       — public exports (re-exports from vc-sdk + CR plugin)
  issuer.ts      — VCIssuer with CR schemas pre-loaded
  issuer/        — per-type issuer helpers
  verifier.ts    — VCVerifier
  verifier/      — per-type verifier helpers
  schemas/       — SchemaPlugin definitions for CR types
  keys.ts        — key utilities
  types.ts       — TypeScript interfaces for all CR credential shapes
```

## Schemas

JSON-LD contexts and JSON Schemas live in a separate repo: [`cr-vc-schemas`](https://github.com/Attestto-com/cr-vc-schemas). Context URLs:
- `https://schemas.attestto.org/cr/driving/v1` — driving, vehicles, traffic
- `https://schemas.attestto.org/cr/identity/v1` — notarial identity, UBO, representation

## Related packages

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `@attestto/vc-sdk` | Universal VC SDK this is built on |
| `cr-vc-schemas` | JSON-LD schemas + SAS on-chain anchoring |
| `@attestto/id-wallet-adapter` | Request and verify VPs from browser wallets |
| `identity-resolver` | Resolve identity from Solana wallet addresses |
| `did-sns-spec` | `did:sns` DID method for `.sol` domains |
